description_long: This is a large, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot of green lawn with a visible driveway and walkways leading to multiple entrances. The structure features a complex, multi-gabled roof with several intersecting sections, giving it a dynamic and expansive appearance. The exterior walls are rendered in a dark color, contrasting with the lighter roof and paved areas. Multiple porches and covered entryways are visible, suggesting a welcoming and accessible design. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, enhancing the architectural interest. The overall layout is sprawling, with wings extending in different directions, typical of a Craftsman or modern suburban bungalow.
description: A sprawling, single-story bungalow with a multi-gabled roof, dark exterior, and multiple porches set on a green lawn with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central porch, and the primary driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended wing, secondary entrance, and the intersection of roof sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the full width of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the layout of walkways, porches, and the sprawling nature of the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
